title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Celticandco Ltd
body: "Application number 5162  Applicant Celtic Sheepskin & Co Ltd objected to the name used by Celticandco Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Celticandco Ltd is changed to 15620291, Ltd. "
